newProperties.name: datalake_coordinator_max_files_per_commit
newProperties.description: Target maximum number of pending data files committed to an Iceberg table in a single commit. A larger backlog is committed across multiple passes to bound the memory used per commit. May be exceeded slightly to avoid splitting files sharing a commit offset.

newProperties.name: datalake_coordinator_max_pending_files
newProperties.description: Maximum number of pending data files a coordinator accumulates across all of its topics before it sheds load, rejecting new files and offset requests until it commits enough of the backlog. Bounds the coordinator's pending-file memory.

newProperties.name: enable_development_metrics
newProperties.description: Enable registering development-oriented metrics on the internal `/metrics` endpoint, such as the per-method internal RPC latency histograms.
